title: マーベラスにするために☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm at the park...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Always be marvelous, no matter when or where! ☆
You and me, we're both marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's the marvelous lady! Maaarvelooous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yoo-hoo! Today and tomorrow will be
marvelous! ☆ Oh, you're maaarvelous too! ★
choice_data_list: So what's with you and "marvelous" again?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
What?! Don't you know? Marvelous is just that!
Marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what kind of response I was
expecting, but the one I get from Marvelous
Sunday is beyond perplexing...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
There's not enough marvelousness in this world!
What can I do to make it more so?
choice_data_list: Throw everything you've got at it?

Maybe chill out a little and let things happen as
they will?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Everything I've got? You don't have to tell me twice! Vroom, vroom! Vaaa-vrooom!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! I'm shifting into higher gears!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Look! I can run nonstop now! Ahahaha! ☆
Ahahaha! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I have no idea what's happening, but I do have a smile on my face after that.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Chill, huh? Well, if that's what you want, I'll show
you chill!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna chillax so hard, it won't be long before
the world becomes cooler than ice!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, now I've got a big craving for some cool
shaved ice! C'mon, let's go! ☆ Ahahaha! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I have no idea what's happening, but I do have a smile on my face after that.
